subcodes.first_line: O beloved handmaid of God! It is morn, and the spirit hath glad tidings, and the heart a gentle grace, and being itself a fresh vigor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی صبحست و روح را بشارتی و قلب را لطافتی و وجود را طراوتی با
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @being a source of light; guidance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @things are known by their opposites
